title: Sinners makes history with Oscar for Best Cinematography - ABC7 San Francisco
text: Autumn Durald Arkapaw won the Oscar for Best Cinematography for the film Sinners at the 2026 Academy Awards. This achievement marks a historic milestone: Arkapaw became the first woman and the first Black person to win in this category. During her acceptance speech, Arkapaw recognized the contributions of women in the industry, saying: I really want all the women in this room to stand up, because I feel like I don't get here without you guys. Her remarks prompted the female audience members to rise and applaud.
